How it works

Live admin knobs and fleet performance. The keyboard (DEBUG builds) polls the knobs every few seconds and applies changes without a rebuild; production devices report quality aggregates that feed the scorecard.

Theme

Arcatext Analysis

Loading…

Parameters

Precision-tiered parameters (Touch tolerance, Decision margin, Learn-from gate) are tuned globally by typist precision and shown only in the global default scope.
